name: BillingCopyRequest
description: Customer is requesting a copy, duplicate, or download of their bill — either digital or paper. They want to receive or access the bill document itself, not understand its contents or dispute any charges.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Can I get a copy of my {billingPeriod} bill?
Send me my {billingPeriod} bill please
I need a PDF of my {billingPeriod} bill
How do I download my bill?
Email me a copy of my {billingPeriod} bill
I want my {billingPeriod} bill sent to me
Where can I download my bill from?
Can you resend my {billingPeriod} bill?
I need a printed copy of my bill
Can I get my {billingPeriod} bill emailed to a different address?
I didn't receive my {billingPeriod} bill — can you send it again?
I need a duplicate bill for my records
My {billingPeriod} bill hasn't come through — can you reissue it?
I want to save my bill as a PDF
How do I get a paper bill posted to me?
Can you provide my {billingPeriod} bill for a mortgage application?
I need copies of the last three months of bills
Print my {billingPeriod} bill
The bill didn't arrive in the post this month
copy of bill
